message:
test(search-core): add 31 tests for document, error, and envelope modules

Expand document.rs from 7 to 15 tests covering:
- DocKind: Hash trait (4 distinct variants in HashSet)
- Document: metadata serde, project_id None, Clone, Debug
- DocChange: Clone, Debug, delete all 4 DocKind variants

Expand error.rs from 5 to 14 tests covering:
- Display: inner message preserved for IndexNotReady,
  IndexCorrupted, InvalidQuery
- error_type: Serialization variant mapping
- Debug: all 7 string variants
- is_retryable: Serialization is not retryable
- Error source chain: Io and Serialization preserve source()
- SearchResult type alias: Ok and Err paths via function

Expand envelope.rs from 21 to 34 tests covering:
- DocVersion: serde roundtrip, Hash distinct, Clone/Copy
- Provenance: serde roundtrip, optional fields skipped
- Visibility: with product_ids serde
- Row types: MessageRow/AgentRow/ProjectRow Debug and Clone
- Agent body format verification
- Agent and Project envelope serde roundtrips
- Project self-referencing project_id

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
